title: Me & Mr Jones, a love story on Natalee-island
original_title: Me & Mr Jones on Natalee Island
overview: Five years after the disappearance of high school girl Natalee Holloway in Aruba, an ambitious journalist wants to break into alleged murderer Joran van der Sloot's home to force a breakthrough in the case.
